title: Animal Crossing: Minecraft Edition
description: This basicly makes the minecraft world round like animal crossing!
body:
So uh... i made animal crossing in minecraft! this resourcepack will turn ur world into a big ball like animal crossing! i could also do this for entities in the feature since right now the entitys dont allign with the big ball.. oh well atleast u have xray now :p

**👉 Important Notice: some optimizing mods (like sodium) wont work with this resourcepack! 👈**

For some appernt reason sometimes also boosts fps XDDDD

**Makes for a great minecraft challange!**
